name: Stirred Custard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, stir together egg yolks, light cream, sugar, and salt.
2. Cook uncovered on 50% power for 3 to 5 minutes or until the mixture thickens slightly, stirring every minute.
3. Remove from heat and place the 2-cup measure in a bowl of ice water. Stir egg yolk mixture for 2 minutes.
4. Add Galliano, brandy, or Ameretto and vanilla. Cover surface with clear plastic wrap and refrigerate until serving time.
5. To serve, spoon over one of the fresh fruits listed above, or a mixture of the selected fresh fruits.
